event_name: Hamlin Park - Winter O' Series Championships
event_notes:
WIOL and O' Series championship meet.

Source series label: WIOL.
event_comments:
Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1998-2002) merged duplicate event 019b81b3-75e2-72d7-b53f-a60a448cee94 ("Hamlin Park"). Reason: newsletter/results duplicate. Notes: The simple Hamlin newsletter row and the results-bearing championship row are the same 2000-02-26 event.

Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1998-2002) merged duplicate event 019b81e3-a50f-7e6e-aaa6-50e1e0d65e0f ("Hamlin Park, Shoreline"). Reason: event-title-as-venue duplicate. Notes: This sparse duplicate pushed the championship title into the venue field while restating the same 2000-02-26 event.
